yaml:
workflow:
  id: content-moderation
  name: Content Moderation Pipeline
  description: |
    Multi-stage moderation: lexical scan → image classifier (parallel) →
    human review if confidence is low → auto-publish on the rest.
  version: "1.2.0"
  variables:
    - name: post
      type: object
    - name: review_threshold
      type: number
      default: 0.85

  steps:
    - id: lexical_scan
      function: apiRequest
      description: Cheap regex+blocklist sweep. Catches the obvious cases before we spend on models.
      input:
        endpoint: /mod/lexical
        body: $post.text
      output: lexical

    - id: lexical_block
      kind: if
      condition: $lexical.blocked
      then:
        - id: hard_reject
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /posts/$post.id/reject
            method: POST
            body:
              reason: $lexical.matched_term
          next_step_id: notify_author

    - id: model_classifiers
      kind: parallel
      description: Run text + image + audio classifiers concurrently. None depend on each other.
      branches:
        - - id: text_classifier
            function: llmCall
            input:
              model: moderation-large
              user: $post.text
            output: text_score
        - - id: image_classifier
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: /mod/image
              body:
                urls: $post.images
            output: image_score
        - - id: audio_classifier
            kind: if
            condition: $post.audio_url
            then:
              - id: audio_transcribe
                function: apiRequest
                input:
                  endpoint: /whisper
                  body: $post.audio_url
                output: transcript
              - id: audio_score
                function: llmCall
                input:
                  model: moderation-large
                  user: $transcript
                output: audio_score

    - id: confidence_check
      kind: if
      description: If any classifier is uncertain, kick to human review.
      condition: $text_score
      then:
        - id: human_review
          function: createTask
          input:
            queue: trust_safety
            content: $post
            scores:
              text: $text_score
              image: $image_score
              audio: $audio_score
          output: review_result
        - id: review_outcome
          kind: if
          condition: $review_result.approved
          then:
            - id: publish_after_review
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /posts/$post.id/publish
                method: POST
          else:
            - id: human_reject
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /posts/$post.id/reject
                method: POST
                body:
                  reason: $review_result.reason
      else:
        - id: auto_publish
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /posts/$post.id/publish
            method: POST

    - id: notify_author
      function: apiRequest
      input:
        endpoint: /notifications
        method: POST
        body:
          user: $post.author_id
          template: moderation_decision
